milestoneTitle: Phase M9.8 — Bootstrapper ghost state on saved project cards. Every saved project card now carries a dashed cyan-border strip at its foot reading 'Bootstrap this project' on the left (impressed glass-label style) with a right-aligned 'coming later' hint. Tapping the strip pops a toast — 'Bootstrapper arrives in a later milestone — your stack + pins seed it.' — so the slot reads as reserved rather than broken. No state change, no telemetry. The strip is sized + padded to match the existing Delete row's rhythm; the dashed border uses color-mix over the Projects --accent-solid token so it inherits the cyan automatically.
